targets.expr:
avg(rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])
) by (db) / avg(rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])
) by (db)

max_over_time((
  rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
  rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
  rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])
)[$aggregation:]) / max_over_time((
  rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
  rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval]) + 
  rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db="$db"}[$__rate_interval])
)[$aggregation:])

avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db) / avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db)

avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db) / avg(rate(endpoint_write_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db)

avg(rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db) / avg(rate(endpoint_read_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval]))  by (proxy, node, db)

avg(rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_sum{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db) / avg(rate(endpoint_other_requests_latency_histogram_count{cluster="$cluster", db=~"$db.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (proxy, node, db)

targets.expr:
avg(label_replace(
  avg(rate(namedprocess_namegroup_thread_cpu_seconds_total{cluster="$cluster", mode="system", groupname=~".*redis-.*", threadname=~".*redis-server.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (groupname, mode),
  "shard_number", "$1", "groupname", ".*redis-(\\d+)"
)
* on (shard_number) group_left(db)
label_replace(redis_server_up{cluster="$cluster", db="$db",role="master"}, "shard_number", "$1", "redis", "(.*)")) by (db)

avg(label_replace(
  avg(rate(namedprocess_namegroup_thread_cpu_seconds_total{cluster="$cluster", mode="user", groupname=~".*redis-.*", threadname=~".*redis-server.*"}[$__rate_interval])) by (groupname, mode),
  "shard_number", "$1", "groupname", ".*redis-(\\d+)"
)

)
* on (shard_number) group_left(db)
label_replace(redis_server_up{cluster="$cluster", db="$db",role="master"}, "shard_number", "$1", "redis", "(.*)")) by (db)
